M

main(String[]) - Static method in class appDomain.XMLParser
Program entry point.
markReported() - Method in class appDomain.Tag
Marks this tag as having already been printed as an error, so it is not reported a second time during final queue reconciliation.
MyArrayList<E> - Class in implementations
MyArrayList is an array-based implementation of the ListADT interface.
MyArrayList() - Constructor for class implementations.MyArrayList
Constructs an empty MyArrayList with the default initial capacity of .
MyDLL<E> - Class in implementations
MyDLL is a doubly linked list implementation of the ListADT interface.
MyDLL() - Constructor for class implementations.MyDLL
Constructs an empty MyDLL.
MyDLLNode<E> - Class in implementations
MyDLLNode represents a single node used internally by MyDLL.
MyDLLNode(E) - Constructor for class implementations.MyDLLNode
Constructs a new MyDLLNode holding the specified element, with no links to any neighbouring nodes.
MyQueue<E> - Class in implementations
MyQueue is a MyDLL-based implementation of the QueueADT interface.
MyQueue() - Constructor for class implementations.MyQueue
Constructs an empty MyQueue.
MyStack<E> - Class in implementations
MyStack is an array-list-based implementation of the StackADT interface.
MyStack() - Constructor for class implementations.MyStack
Constructs an empty MyStack.
